indication: IDHIFA is an isocitrate dehydrogenase-2 inhibitor indicated for the treatment of adult patients with relapsed or refractory acute myeloid leukemia (AML) with an isocitrate dehydrogenase-2 (IDH2) mutation as detected by an FDA-approved test.
description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted approval to enasidenib for the treatment of adult patients with relapsed or refractory acute myeloid leukemia (AML) with an isocitrate dehydrogenase-2 (IDH2) mutation as detected by an FDA-approved test.
raw_cancer_type: relapsed or refractory acute myeloid leukemia (AML)

document.name: Idhifa (enasidenib) [package insert]. FDA.
